name: Georges Miquelle
abstract: Georges Miquelle (1894 – 1977) was born in Lille, France. He was a classical cellist in France and the United States.

works.t: Septet in E-flat Major, Op. 20: 6. Andante con moto alla marcia – Presto

about_quotes.speaker: Ron Carter
about_quotes.evidence: my teacher introduced me to Georges Miquelle and he said to come audition this day... he thought that I had enough talent to recommend me to a full scholarship to the Eastman School of Music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ron Carter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
